scripts.start-all: npm --prefix Backend install && set TIKTOK_BRIDGE_ENABLED=false&& npm --prefix Backend run dev
scripts.start-all:live: npm --prefix Backend install && set TIKTOK_BRIDGE_ENABLED=true&& npm --prefix Backend run dev
scripts.webgl:help: node -e "console.log('webgl: a la racine du depot: npm run webgl:vercel (pas cd webgl-site: Root Vercel=webgl-site => doublon). API: npm run backend:vercel ou cd Backend && npm run backend:vercel.')"
